--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,171 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase, sets default routing with SmartRouter fallback
+- Names noticed: `Hono` (main export), `HonoBase`, `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, `BlankEnv`, `BlankSchema`, `Env`, `Schema`, default router configuration using SmartRouter with nested RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Primary application class, instantiates with SmartRouter by default
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono framework base class handling request dispatching, routing, middleware composition, error handling, and lifecycle
+- Names noticed: `HonoBase` (exported fallback alias for Hono), `HonoOptions`, `H` (handler), `Router` (type), `Route` types for `get`, `post`, `put`, `delete`, `patch`, `all`, `on`, `use`, private `#path` state, internal `#addRoute` method, `#dispatch` for request handling, static `#handleError`, `compose`, `Context`, `METHODS`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL`, `METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE`, `notFoundHandler`, `errorHandler`, `GET`, `POST` etc., `utils/constants` (COMPOSED_HANDLER), `utils/url` helpers (getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath)
+- Simple note: Main router implementation with method chaining, middleware support, handler composition
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory entry point for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter` (export)
+- Simple note: Single-line export wrapper
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router converting path patterns to RegEx for matching, supports path parameters
+- Names noticed: `PatternRouter` (exported class), `UnsupportedPathError` (thrown for invalid patterns like duplicate params), `METHOD_NAME_ALL` ('ALL'), path parameter patterns (`:name`), label regex `{pattern}`, `emptyParams` (empty object for static routes), RegEx pattern construction, matching logic using RegEx for pattern matching
+- Simple note: Converts `:` parameter names to capture groups in RegEx, matches paths against compiled patterns, supports `/*` wildcard (matches static route prefix only)
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory entry point for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter` (export)
+- Simple note: Single-line export wrapper
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Sequential path string router for exact matches and wildcards, no RegEx compilation
+- Names noticed: `LinearRouter` (exported class), `METHOD_NAME_ALL` ('ALL'), `UnsupportedPathError` (thrown for conflicts like `:label + *`), `checkOptionalParameter` (utility to handle trailing param patterns), `*:match against all trailing paths`, `/:name` (simple label), `/:name{pattern}` (label with RegEx), label character code check (58 for `:`), star character code check (42 for `*`), `splitPathRe` pattern for parsing, `splitByStarRe` pattern, `ROUTES_LOOP` continue label for conflicts
+- Simple note: Stores routes as strings in array, iterates linearly comparing each route string against request path, handles `/*` and `:param` patterns, rejects ambiguous combinations
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Preprocessor entry point for RegExpRouter family with PreparedRouter support
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter`, `PreparedRegExpRouter`, `buildInitParams` (for PreparedRouter), `serializeInitParams` (for PreparedRouter)
+- Simple note: Factory exports + prepared router utilities for serialization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Builds RegEx patterns from routes, compiles middleware, performs matching against RegEx
+- Names noticed: `RegExpRouter` (exported class), `Matcher` (interface: `[RegEx, HandlerData[], StaticMap]`), `Trie` (for building RegEx), `Node` (for Trie structure), `buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes` (combines routes into matcher), `buildWildcardRegExp` (compiles `/*` to RegEx), `findMiddleware` (locates middleware by path pattern), `MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT` (error thrown after build), `UnsupportedPathError` (thrown for conflicts), `PATH_ERROR` (symbol), `buildAllMatchers` (creates `MatcherMap`), `match` (delegate to `./matcher`), `ParamIndexMap`, `HandlerWithMetadata` (array wrapper)
+- Simple note: Routes are preprocessed into Trie then RegEx built at `add()` time, middleware found via pattern matching, matcher is built once and cached
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Performs request matching against compiled RegEx matcher
+- Names noticed: `match` (matching function), `emptyParam`, `emptyParam` (array), `Matcher` (interface: `[RegEx, HandlerData[], StaticMap]`), `MatcherMap` (record of matchers by HTTP method), `StaticMap` (static path to `Result`), `HandlerData` (handler with param index map), `METHOD_NAME_ALL` ('ALL'), internal `match` method that delegates to matcher lookup
+- Simple note: Checks StaticMap first, then falls back to RegEx match, returns handlers with params using param index resolution
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Runtime version of RegExpRouter that receives pre-built matcher and reassigns paths later
+- Names noticed: `PreparedRegExpRouter` (exported class), `buildInitParams` (builder), `serializeInitParams` (JSON-like serialization string), `RelocateMap` (path -> index/map structure), `add` (accepts path at runtime), `#matchers` (cache), `#addWildcard` (adds handler to all methods), `#addPath` (adds handler to specific path), `buildAllMatchers` returns matchers at construction
+- Simple note: Uses serialized matcher from `RegExpRouter.buildAllMatchers()`, allows adding new paths later via `add`, re-relocates handler indices
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node structure for building pattern-based RegEx
+- Names noticed: `Node` (Trie node class), `Context` (Trie build context with varIndex), `PATH_ERROR` (symbol for invalid patterns), `ParamAssocArray` (param name -> index mapping), `compareKey` sorts: literal < pattern < label < wildcard, `#children` (node map), `#index` (static path result), `#varIndex` (param counter), `insert` (add token to Trie), `buildRegExpStr` (construct RegEx string from Trie)
+- Simple note: Nodes hold children by path segment, buildRegExpStr creates final RegEx string, handles parameter index mapping
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-structure router walking path segments, no RegEx compilation
+- Names noticed: `TrieRouter` (exported class), `Node` (router node), `checkOptionalParameter` (path parameter detection), search uses queue-based traversal, matches segments against path, collects handlers along successful path
+- Simple note: Walks path by segments, matches nodes in `add` and `search`, returns all matching handlers, handles dynamic params and wildcards
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory entry point for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: `TrieRouter` (export)
+- Simple note: Single-line export wrapper
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite helper used by all router test files
+- Names noticed: `runTest`, `getSuiteHierarchy`, `Task` wrapper that applies skip logic, `describe 'Common'`, method-level tests: `Basic Usage`, `Reserved words`, `Complex`, `Registration order`, `Multi match`, `Duplicate param name`, `page`, `star`, `Optional route`, `All`, `long prefix then star`, `Including slashes`, `Capture simple multiple directories`, `Capture regex pattern has trailing wildcard`, `Capture complex multiple directories`, `Capture multiple directories and optional`, `non ascii characters`, `REST API`, `Trailing slash`, `Same path`, `Routing with a hostname`, `static routes of ALL and GET`, `ALL and Star`, `GET star ALL static GET star`, `GET star GET static ALL star`, `ALL star ALL star GET static ALL star`, `Capture Group` with sub-suites: `Simple capturing group`, `Non-capturing group`, `Non-capturing group with prefix`, `Complex capturing group`, `Unknown method`, `hierarchy` (no-throw test)
+- Simple note: Defines common behaviors, injects into all router describe blocks, skips failing tests
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: imports `runTest` from common, `UnsupportedPathError`, imports `PatternRouter`, `Skip` section lists: `Duplicate param name > self` (throws), `Trailing slash > GET /book/` (pattern-router allows slash), additional test: `Trailing slash` verifies `/book` vs `/book/` match behavior, pattern allows trailing slash for static routes
+- Simple note: Runs common tests with skips, adds own trailing slash test
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: imports `runTest` from common, `UnsupportedPathError`, imports `LinearRouter`, `Skip` section lists: `Multi match > params per handler > GET /entry/123/show` (throws), `Capture regex pattern has trailing wildcard`, `Complex > Parameter with {.*} regexp`, `Trailing slash > GET /book/` (forwards to common), `skip 'Trailing slash' means linear forwards, then skips the slash test
+- Simple note: Runs common tests with skips, fails complex RegEx cases, forwards slash test to common
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter including internal matcher
+- Names noticed: imports `runTest` from common, imports `RegExpRouter`, `ParamStash`, `UnsupportedPathError`, skips: `Duplicate param name > parent`, `Duplicate param name > child`, `Capture Group > Complex capturing group > GET request` (requires non-capturing or lookahead), `Capture complex multiple directories`, `Complex > Parameter with {.*} regexp`, `Including slashes > GET /js/main.js` (ambiguous in RegEx-only), returns: `[[T, ParamIndexMap][], ParamStash]` (RegEx returns ParamStash), multiple `UnsupportedPathError` tests: ambiguous param conflicts, static/dynamic order conflicts, different RegEx patterns, complex capturing group without lookahead, `RETURN_VALUE_TYPE` test, sub-describe structure with reason strings
+- Simple note: More skips than other routers, tests RegEx ambiguities, returns ParamStash for param index resolution
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter (fallback router)
+- Names noticed: imports `runTest` from common, imports `SmartRouter`, `RegExpRouter`, `TrieRouter`, no skip section, SmartRouter wraps and delegates to first router that successfully builds matcher, tests run with RegExpRouter + TrieRouter default
+- Simple note: No skips, delegates to fallback router family
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: imports `runTest` from common, imports `TrieRouter`, no skip section, tests cover same path, optional params, multi-match, complex patterns, wildcard behavior, param score ordering
+- Simple note: Passes all common tests without skips, supports all cases that other routers skip
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Node class (Trie node)
+- Names noticed: `Node` class, `insert` for node insertion, `search` for path matching, Root Node test (insert `get /`), Node without initial method, `Get with *` tests for wildcard behavior, JS reserved words with `*`: `constructor`, `__proto__`, tests per section: Basic Usage, Name path, Param prefix, Named params and wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match (Basic, Blog, ALL, Regexp, Trailing slash, Same path, Including slashes, REST API), Duplicate param name (self, parent, child, regular expression), Sort Order (Basic, With Named path, With Wildcards, With special Wildcard, Complex, Multi match x2, fallback, page), star (top, Under path), Routing order With named parameters, Same name for path params (Basic, Complex, Complex with tails), Node with initial method and handler via constructor
+- Simple note: Comprehensive node-level tests, no `describe` wrapper, direct describe sections, includes sort order tests
+
